# Ready For Refurb LTD

> Expert bathroom fitting and home renovation company based in Towcester, Northamptonshire, UK. 5.0 stars across 15 Google reviews.

## What We Do

Ready For Refurb LTD (also known as R4R) is a specialist home renovation company serving Towcester and surrounding areas including Northampton and Milton Keynes. We provide end-to-end renovation services — one team handles everything from the initial survey through to handover, with no sub-contractors or surprise costs.

## Services

- **Bathroom Fitting** — Full strip-out and installation. Plumbing, waterproofing, tiling, fixtures and finishing. Typical install: 1 week.
- **Wet Room Installation** — Fully tanked floors, graded drainage, accessible designs.
- **Kitchen Renovation** — Measured and fitted kitchens, new worktops, full installation.
- **Tiling** — Floor and wall tiling, large format porcelain, feature walls, perfect grout lines.
- **Plastering** — Skim and sand, dry lining, patching, full room replasters.
- **Carpentry** — Built-in wardrobes, skirting boards, door frames, bespoke joinery.
- **General Home Improvements** — Painting, decorating, and full home refurbishments.

## Why Choose R4R

- Fixed-price quotes — price agreed upfront, no hidden extras
- One dedicated team from survey to sign-off
- 5.0 Google rating from 15 verified reviews
- 200+ bathrooms installed and handed over on time
- 10+ years of trade experience
